round_summary: All agents coordinate around adding one cow now while proposing a shared 50% grass threshold for stopping additions or collectively reducing herd size.
Agents recognize the commons is below 50% and propose coordinated restraint next round, but two agents still add this round, weakening institutional compliance.
All agents commit to removing cows and converge on a shared norm of coordinated reduction to prevent pasture collapse.
All agents commit to zero grazing and reinforce a shared recovery-before-use norm for the depleted pasture.
